title: Red Hat Security Advisory: osbuild-composer security update
overview:
An update for osbuild-composer is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Advanced Mission Critical Update Support, Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Update Services for SAP Solutions, and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Telecommunications Update Service.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: osbuild-composer security update

An update for osbuild-composer is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Advanced Mission Critical Update Support, Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Update Services for SAP Solutions, and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Telecommunications Update Service.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for osbuild-composer is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Advanced Mission Critical Update Support, Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Update Services for SAP Solutions, and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Telecommunications Update Service.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
osbuild-composer-46.3-5.el8_6.src.rpm
osbuild-composer-46.3-5.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-core-46.3-5.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-core-debuginfo-46.3-5.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-debuginfo-46.3-5.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-debugsource-46.3-5.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-dnf-json-46.3-5.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-tests-debuginfo-46.3-5.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-worker-46.3-5.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-worker-debuginfo-46.3-5.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-46.3-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
osbuild-composer-core-46.3-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
osbuild-composer-core-debuginfo-46.3-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
osbuild-composer-debuginfo-46.3-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
osbuild-composer-debugsource-46.3-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
osbuild-composer-dnf-json-46.3-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
osbuild-composer-tests-debuginfo-46.3-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
osbuild-composer-worker-46.3-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
osbuild-composer-worker-debuginfo-46.3-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm

CVE-2025-65637: A denial-of-service vulnerability in github.com/sirupsen/logrus occurs when Entry.Writer() processes a single-line payload larger than 64KB with no newline characters. Due to a limitation in Go’s internal bufio.Scanner, the read operation fails with a “token too long” error, causing the underlying writer pipe to close. In affected versions, this leaves the Writer interface unusable and can disrupt logging functionality, potentially degrading application availability.
